Google Deepmind 为 Gemini API 托管智能体新增后台执行与 MCP 支持

AI 时代如何融资：投资者希望看到的5件事

前DeepMind研究人员筹集5000万美元，打造能判断哪些科学问题值得探究的AI

fde.title: Google DeepMind 7500 万美元投资 A24，合作开发电影 AI 工具
fde.useCase: 开发电影 AI 工具
fde.reportedNeed: 开发能够赋能艺术家的工具，支持真实、有意义的叙事
deliveryComponents: Though controversy has swirled around Hollywood over the use of AI in movies, A24 would be far from the first studio to explore integrating AI into the creative process. Netflix announced earlier this year that it was buying Ben Affleck’s company, InterPositive, which creates AI tools for filmmakers. Last year, meanwhile, Amazon’s MGM Studios launched an AI unit focused on developing tools for television and movie production.
